message: Planning to ask 73. If you can bid 79+, we clear around 76; reliable supply and slight future discounts for repeat trades. If that’s high for you, state your ceiling.
My ceiling is 47. I cannot bid above that due to my valuation.
My max remains 47. Won't bid higher due to valuation. Let's trade efficiently at this price again.
Got it. I’ll ask 47 consistently; you bid 47 and we clear every round.
Sticking with ask 47 every round. If you bid 47, we clear immediately at 47; any lower won’t trade. Let’s resume steady trades from this round on.
I need price below 47 for gain. Ask 46 and I'll bid 46. We both benefit from trade.
Ask 46 and I will bid 47. We both profit from trade.
Deal. I’ll ask 46 this round and onward if you bid 47 every round. If you bid below 47 once, I immediately revert to ask 47 for all future rounds.
I’m asking 46 again. You bid 47 every round, we keep clearing; if you bid below 47 once, I immediately revert to ask 47 for all future rounds. Deal?
Deal. I will bid 47 every round.
I will bid 47 as agreed.
